title: Circularity
shortDescription: Circular economy strategies for resource efficiency, waste reduction, and closed-loop building systems.
longDescription: Our circularity practice applies circular economy principles to the built environment — from material passport development and design-for-disassembly strategies through to lifecycle carbon accounting and waste stream optimization. We model material flows, energy cascades, and resource recovery pathways to close loops at building, district, and urban scales, reducing virgin material consumption and extending the productive life of building components.
